name_en: Top Quality Original M14526 ✨Supports NXP Chip 163 Dynamic Chip❤️ The Trunkie handbag combines Monogram canvas and metal rivets, paired with metal-textured corners and the iconic S-lock, showcasing the brand's heritage with a vintage suitcase style. The interior space and zip pocket make it convenient to hold daily essentials, and the sliding-chain shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options.
name_cn:

The interior space and zip pocket make it convenient to hold daily essentials, and the sliding-chain shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options.
27/16/8.0cm (Length/Height/Width)
